scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build --dev --target web --out-dir browser/pkg --out-name slint_wasm_interpreter .. -- --no-default-features --features console_error_panic_hook
scripts.build:wasm-release: wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir browser/pkg --out-name slint_wasm_interpreter .. -- --no-default-features --features console_error_panic_hook
